message:
perf(ext): regenerate perf comparison + add legacy benchmark script (bd-uah)

Run fresh legacy benchmarks (Node.js v22.2.0) and regenerate the Rust vs
Legacy performance comparison report with updated data. Add the legacy
extension workload harness script used for baseline measurements.

Results: hello cold-load Rust 96ms vs Legacy 21ms (4.5x), tool call
Rust 44us vs Legacy 1.7us (26x), all within acceptable bounds given
LLM API latency dominates interactive sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # Extension Performance Comparison: Rust vs Legacy
 
-> Generated: 2026-02-01T01:09:56Z
+> Generated: 2026-02-01T01:12:42Z
 
 ## Executive Summary
 
@@ -25,10 +25,10 @@
 | Event Hook | legacy event calls/sec | N/A (see tool call) | 582092 | - | - | INFO |
 | E2E Process | 200 iters x 1 tool (hyperfine median) | 16.8ms | N/A | - | - | INFO |
 | E2E Process | 200 iters x 10 tools (hyperfine median) | 94.8ms | N/A | - | - | INFO |
-| Stress | 30s sustained load (15 exts, 50 evt/s) | 1313 events, 0 errors | N/A | - | - | PASS |
-| Stress | RSS growth under load | 0.00% | N/A | - | - | PASS |
-| Stress | Dispatch p50 latency | 16689us | N/A | - | - | INFO |
-| Stress | Dispatch p99 latency | 31272us | N/A | - | - | PASS |
+| Stress | 30s sustained load (15 exts, 50 evt/s) | 1378 events, 0 errors | N/A | - | - | PASS |
+| Stress | RSS growth under load | 0.65% | N/A | - | - | PASS |
+| Stress | Dispatch p50 latency | 16362us | N/A | - | - | INFO |
+| Stress | Dispatch p99 latency | 24161us | N/A | - | - | PASS |
 
 ## Regression Analysis
